outline.title: Digzio Platform — Sprint 3 Complete
outline.summary: Title slide: Sprint 3 complete, soft launch ready. Subtitle: KYC, Applications, Leases & Institutions live in AWS af-south-1.

outline.title: Full Platform Now Live — 3 Sprints, 8 Microservices
outline.summary: High-level overview of the complete platform: 3 sprints delivered, 8 microservices running on ECS Fargate in Cape Town, PostgreSQL + Redis + CloudFront all active.

outline.title: Sprint 3 Delivered 4 New Microservices
outline.summary: KYC Service (port 3005), Application Service (3006), Lease Service (3007), Institution API (3008) — each with their key endpoints and responsibilities.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Student Rental Journey — End-to-End in 6 Steps
outline.summary: Full student workflow: Register → KYC → Search Properties → Apply → Lease Generated → Sign. Each step maps to a live API endpoint.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Provider Workflow — List, Review, Approve, Lease
outline.summary: Provider workflow: Register → List Property → Receive Applications → Approve Tenant → Generate Lease PDF → Track Active Leases.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Institution Workflow — Verify Students, Accredit Properties
outline.summary: Institution workflow: Register → Link Students → Verify Enrollment → Accredit Properties → Monitor Occupancy.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: AWS Infrastructure — All Services Live in af-south-1
outline.summary: Full infrastructure summary: VPC, RDS PostgreSQL 15, ElastiCache Redis 7, ECS Fargate cluster, ALB, CloudFront CDN, 8 ECR repos, AWS SES email — all in Cape Town.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Test — Seed Data & Postman Collection Included
outline.summary: 4 dummy accounts pre-loaded (student, provider, admin, institution), 2 sample properties, 1 pending application. Postman collection with all workflows ready to import and run.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Sprint 4 — Payment Module When Ready
outline.summary: What Sprint 4 will deliver: PayFast integration for ZAR rent collection, payment history, deposit tracking, receipt generation via SES. Parked until soft launch validation complete.
